properties.name: resourceCompletionConfig.force-erase-file-name
properties.description: Regenerate resource file names even when a file name already exists.

properties.name: resourceCompletionConfig.download-user-agent
properties.description: User-agent sent when downloading remote resources.

properties.name: resourceCompletionConfig.connect-timeout-ms
properties.description: Connection timeout, in milliseconds, for remote resource downloads.

properties.name: resourceCompletionConfig.socket-timeout-ms
properties.description: Socket timeout, in milliseconds, for remote resource downloads.

properties.name: resourceCompletionConfig.embedding-similarity-threshold
properties.description: Cosine similarity threshold used to group image embeddings.

properties.name: resourceCompletionConfig.perceptive-hash-size
properties.description: Perceptive hash size used by jImageHash.

properties.name: resourceCompletionConfig.perceptive-hash-alpha-threshold
properties.description: Alpha value above which transparent pixels are treated as opaque for perceptive hashing.

properties.name: resourceCompletionConfig.pdf-language-min-confidence
properties.description: Minimum language detector raw score for a language to count as present in a PDF.

properties.name: resourceCompletionConfig.pdf-language-max-pages
properties.description: Maximum number of PDF pages extracted for language detection.

properties.name: resourceCompletionConfig.pdf-language-max-chars
properties.description: Maximum number of extracted characters used for PDF language detection.

properties.name: resourceCompletionConfig.pdf-title-max-lines
properties.description: Maximum number of first-page text lines inspected for PDF title extraction.

properties.name: resourceCompletionConfig.pdf-title-font-size-tolerance
properties.description: Font-size tolerance used when grouping PDF title candidate lines.
